translations.en: Tholden
translations.zh: 索登

translations.en: a preoccupied man holding a ledger under one arm.
translations.zh: 一名腋下夾著帳冊，神情專注的男子。

translations.en: "Records to keep, festivals to plan, I'm so busy... But I can spare you a moment, $G."
translations.zh: 「要記帳冊，要籌節慶，老臣忙得很……但仍可為$G撥冗片刻。」

translations.en: name
translations.zh: 名字

translations.en: "I am Tholden von Bazillius, Chancellor to Lord @British."
translations.zh: 「老臣索登·馮·巴齊柳斯，乃@不列顛王之宰相。」

translations.en: "In my younger days, I was known as 'The @Werecat of the Wine Cellar'..."
translations.zh: 「想當年，老臣有個綽號叫『@酒窖之貓人』……」

translations.en: were,cat,wine,cell,youn
translations.zh: 貓人,貓,酒,窖,當年

translations.en: "I could tell you stories... But there's no time for that now."
translations.zh: 「故事多得是，可惜如今已無暇細說了。」

translations.en: lord,brit
translations.zh: lord,brit

translations.en: "A fine ruler indeed. 'Tis a pleasure to keep his kingdom running smoothly for him."
translations.zh: 「實乃一代賢君。能為陛下打理國政，老臣甚以為樂。」

translations.en: job
translations.zh: 業

translations.en: "All the little details of governing, all the paperwork falls on my shoulders."
translations.zh: 「治國繁瑣諸事、文牘案牘，皆落在老臣肩上。」

translations.en: "Someone must do it, and yet I miss the days when I was a carefree adventurer."
translations.zh: 「總得有人來做，然老臣仍懷念當年無拘無束的冒險歲月。」

translations.en: rune,mant,comp
translations.zh: 符文,真言,慈悲

translations.en: "The rune and mantra of Compassion are in the keeping of the bards at the @Conservatory."
translations.zh: 「慈悲之符文與真言，由@音樂院的吟遊詩人們所保管。」

translations.en: "I entrusted them with the rune due to their compassionate nature."
translations.zh: 「老臣因詩人們秉性慈悲，故將符文託予之。」

translations.en: "As for the other runes - they are no longer together, as they were when the @Codex was recovered."
translations.zh: 「至於其餘符文，自@守則之書尋回後，便不再聚於一處。」

translations.en: "Since then, they have become scattered throughout the land. Each was sent to a town near its shrine."
translations.zh: 「自彼時起，諸符文便散佈於全境，各自送往臨近其聖壇之城。」

translations.en: "If thou dost ask the lords of each of these towns, they should be able to tell thee more."
translations.zh: 「汝若向各城首領詢問，應能得知更多詳情。」

translations.en: "The towns are Moonglow, Jhelom, Yew, Minoc, Trinsic, Skara Brae, and New Magincia."
translations.zh: 「諸城為月華城、傑隆、尤伊、米諾克、崔西克、斯卡拉布雷、新馬精西亞。」

translations.en: code
translations.zh: 守則

translations.en: "'Tis the greatest treasure in all the realm."
translations.zh: 「此乃此境最珍貴之寶。」

translations.en: cons
translations.zh: 音樂

translations.en: "'Twas founded by Lord British."
translations.zh: 「乃陛下所創立。」

translations.en: bye
translations.zh: bye

translations.en: Tholden goes down on one knee and kisses your hand.
translations.zh: 索登單膝跪地，輕吻汝之手。

translations.en: Tholden bows deeply.
translations.zh: 索登深深一鞠躬。

translations.en: "I hope I have been of assistance, $G."
translations.zh: 「願老臣有所助益，$G。」

translations.en: "I cannot help thee with that."
translations.zh: 「此事老臣無能為力。」

translator_notes: Tholden 自稱『老臣/臣』，對 LB 稱『陛下』，對玩家『汝』。29 條 ≤ len。
